channel.title: Posts on mutablefigment's webspace
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on mutablefigment's webspace

item.title: Building a simple home robot
item.description:
Building a small robot with tracks for fun and no profit (part 0)

Sometime ago I decided I wanna build something related to electronics and programming. After talking with some of my friends, I have decided that I want to build a small robot that can drive around my apartment, can see using a camera and somesort of vision processing as well as speak. For the language intensive parts I decided to use an Ollama instance running on my local NixOS cluster.
